insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07. Existing extensions will continue to work, but new ones should not use this hook. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should stop using the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook in new checkout UI extensions and update existing ones to avoid future breaking changes. They should explore alternative solutions for intercepting the buyer journey. The deprecation does not immediately break existing extensions, but it's crucial to migrate them to ensure future compatibility.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will not experience immediate changes, but they may notice differences in how checkout UI extensions interact with the buyer journey as developers update their extensions to comply with the deprecation.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation matters because it affects how checkout UI extensions are developed and interact with Shopify's checkout, potentially impacting the merchant and buyer experience. It's part of Shopify's effort to evolve and improve its APIs and developer tools.

also_worth_knowing.text: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now allows server-side code to handle breaking changes to action configurations, reducing validation failures. This change gives developers more control over how changes are handled.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs, ensuring that existing workflows use the new URL after app redeployment. This change streamlines the workflow update process.
CLI version 4.4.0 includes updates to Javy dependencies, validation for GCS bundle uploads, and fixes for long URL wrapping in banners and alerts. These changes improve the overall CLI experience.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify honest and transparent review practices. This change affects all apps published to the Shopify App Store.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and related Checkout types have been removed from the Customer Account API as of version 2026-10. Developers should update their code to reflect this change.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for more granular market configurations. This change is available in Admin GraphQL API version 2026-07.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill, as of API version 2026-10. This change provides more accurate fulfillment status information.

updates.title: Deprecating the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions
updates.summary: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated as of version 2026-07. Developers should update their extensions to use alternative methods.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The Shop Minis update includes new features such as product variant intents and typed hooks for selecting variants and sending buyers to express checkout.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to configure shipping options directly in Markets and vary rates by product and location.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: @shopify/mini-oxygen version 4.2.0 includes minor changes such as making the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient and inferring compatibility dates.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: @shopify/cli-hydrogen version 13.0.0 includes patch changes such as adding deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

recap.headline: Shopify updates GraphQL Admin API, deprecates REST-dependent features, and enhances Hydrogen

themes.title: GraphQL Admin API Updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API has been updated with new fields, such as `lineItem` on the `GiftCard` object, `discountApplications` on `DraftOrder`, and `legalEntityId` on `BusinessEntity`. Additionally, the `discountedUnitPrice` field on `DraftOrderLineItem` has been deprecated in favor of `approximateDiscountedUnitPrice`.

themes.title: Deprecations and Removals
themes.detail: Several features are being deprecated or removed, including the use of `useBuyerJourneyIntercept` on checkout UI extensions, cumulative marketing engagements, and merchant-owned delivery profile APIs. The `Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout` field has also been removed as of API version 2026-10.

themes.title: Hydrogen and CLI Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen has been updated with new features, such as the ability to infer a compatibility date from the resolved Hydrogen package, and the `@shopify/cli-hydrogen` package has been updated to version 13.0.0 with new deploy flags and environment variables.

actions.text: Update GraphQL Admin API queries to use new fields and deprecate removed fields
Migrate checkout UI extensions to use alternative hooks
Review and update marketing engagement integrations to send non-cumulative engagements
